summary: Frontend testing completed for Reading and Listening Tests. The reported bug (Q27-32 showing as Q28, Q29 duplicated with 'maths had little' content) has been FIXED. All Reading Test 1 & 2 passages load correctly with properly numbered, non-duplicated questions. Summary completion questions (Q27-32) in Reading Test 2 Passage 3 now display correctly with word bank options. Listening Test 1 & 2 also load correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Reading Test 1 - All 3 passages load correctly with proper question types (TRUE/FALSE/NOT GIVEN, Matching Information, Multiple Choice)
Reading Test 2 - Passage 1 (Industrial Revolution) shows sentence completion + true/false questions correctly
Reading Test 2 - Passage 2 (Athletes and Stress) shows matching information questions correctly
Reading Test 2 - Passage 3 (Gifted Child) shows summary completion Q27-32 with WORD BANK clickable options - BUG FIXED
Questions are numbered correctly (27, 28, 29, 30, 31, 32) and NOT duplicated
Word bank displays 11 options (A-K): appeal, determined, intrigued, single, achievement, devoted, involved, unique, innovative, satisfaction, intent
Listening Test 1 & 2 load with correct questions and audio players
seed_data_creation: Database was reseeded by main agent with proper IELTS test structure
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reading and Listening tests verified working. The Q27-32 duplication bug has been fixed. Summary completion questions now show proper word bank with clickable options. All question types render correctly: true_false_notgiven, yes_no_notgiven, sentence_completion, summary_completion with options, matching_information, multiple_choice, multiple_choice_multi.

reading_test_1_passage_2.title: The pirates of the ancient Mediterranean
reading_test_1_passage_2.notes: Paragraph labels (A, B, C...) displayed correctly for matching

reading_test_1_passage_3.title: The persistence and peril of misinformation

reading_test_2_passage_3.title: An inquiry into the existence of the gifted child
reading_test_2_passage_3.bug_fix_verified: Q27-32 now display correctly with proper numbering and word bank options (A-K)

bug_verification.original_issue: Reading Test questions were broken - showing duplicate/incorrect questions (Q28, Q29 repeating with same 'maths had little' content)
verification_details: Q27: 'Maryam Mirzakhani is regarded as _____ in the field of mathematics...' - displays correctly
Q28: 'However, maths had little _____ for her as a child.' - displays correctly (NOT duplicated)
Q29: 'In fact her performance was below average until she was _____ by a difficult puzzle...' - displays correctly
Q30: 'Later, as a professional mathematician, she had an inquiring mind and proved herself to be _____...' - displays correctly
Q31: 'She said that she got the greatest _____ from making ground-breaking discoveries.' - displays correctly
Q32: 'She was responsible for some extremely _____ mathematical studies.' - displays correctly
All questions have proper word bank with 11 clickable options
